checks.description: Detect Maven or Gradle project metadata.
Detect Spring Boot version from Maven or Gradle metadata.
Find javax namespace usage that blocks Spring Boot 3 readiness.
Find Spring field injection patterns that increase migration risk.
Plan Spring Boot 2 to 3 and Jakarta namespace transformations before applying changes.
Rewrite supported javax namespaces to Jakarta equivalents with rollback evidence.
Capture Maven or Gradle compile and test validation after dry-run, apply, or rollback.
Summarize compile, test, rollback, compatibility, and confidence evidence for Professional packaging.
Apply client-defined .preflight-rules.yml checks to readiness scoring and report evidence.
